data.title: Boeing Shares Are Taking Off Tuesday: What's Going On?
data.description: Boeing Co (NYSE: BA) shares are trading higher Tuesday following reports the company has resumed production of its 737 MAX aircraft after a lengthy halt caused by an employee strike. Here's what you need to know.

data.title: Despite the Hype, Avoid This Sector in 2025
data.description: The small-cap stock rally may not continue in 2025, despite recent outperformance. Bullish sentiment and lack of sustained growth raise concerns.

data.title: Jake Paul, Mike Tyson, Simone Biles And More: The Most-Searched Athletes On Google In 2024
data.description: The top 10 most-searched athletes on Google shows fans around the world liked boxing, cricket, soccer and the Olympics during the year.

data.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO Murder Suspect: Chronic Pain, Unabomber Fascination, Isolation Details Emerge
data.description: Luigi Mangione charged with the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson. Family and friends say he was distant and had back pain. Manifesto suggests anger towards healthcare companies.

data.title: Duolingo And Netflix Bring Squid Game Fans Closer To Korean with New Language Challenge
data.description: Duolingo partners with Netflix's Squid Game for a fun "Learn Korean or Else" campaign, encouraging fans to embrace the language before Season 2.
